title: Complete Toshl API Schema Collection
description: All available Toshl API schemas combined into one file

main.title: Index
main.description: A list of Toshl API endpoints

links.title: Me
links.description: Access currently logged in user details

links.title: Accounts
links.description: Access users accounts

links.title: Entries
links.description: Access users entries

links.title: Budgets
links.description: Access users budgets

links.title: Categories
links.description: Access users categories

links.title: Tags
links.description: Access users tags

links.title: Currencies
links.description: Access available currencies

links.title: Exports
links.description: Access users exports

account.title: Accounts
description: Accounts endpoint can be used to interact with [users](/docs/me) accounts.

_Note:_ Be advised that accounts are subject to [free account limitation](/docs/free). If a user with a free account tries to add an account and goes over the alowed number of accounts, a 403 (Forbidden) [error](/docs/errors) will be returned and the account will be discarded.

name_override.title: Name override
name_override.description: Is true if name is overriden with a custom name.

limit.title: Account limit
limit.description: Account limit. If no limit is set null is returned

rate.title: Exchange rate
rate.description: Account exchange rate calculated according to users currency. If not set (and currency differs from main currency) the daily exchange rate should be used.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency
main_rate.description: Entry exchange rate main currency calculated according to entry [main](/docs/me) currency.

fixed.title: Fixed exchange rate
fixed.description: If set to true, the exchange rate is fixed.

daily_sum_median.title: Median
daily_sum_median.description: Calculated median of daily sums of expenses and incomes.

expenses.title: Daily expenses sum median
expenses.description: Median of daily sums of expenses.

incomes.title: Daily income sum median
incomes.description: Median of daily sums of incomes.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the account was last modified.

goal.title: Savings goal
goal.description: If account is a savings goal this includes a savings goal object.

start.title: Goal start date
start.description: Savings goal start date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

end.title: Goal end date
end.description: Savings goal end date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

connection.title: Account institution connection
connection.description: If account is connected to an institution connection (bank etc.) this object includes details about the connection

status.title: Connection status
status.description: Connection status. `connected` means all is well, `disconnected` means sync is disabled, `inactive` means pro is needed to reactivate, `error` means there is an error with the connection and a re-login is required.

logo.title: Institution logo
logo.description: Institution logo url if institution has a logo.

settle.title: Account settle
settle.description: If account is set to automatically settle each month this object includes details about the settle day of the month.

byday.title: By day
byday.description: A comma separated list of weekdays (`MO,TU..`). Each weekday can have be preceded by a positive or negative number (`1MO` - 1st monday of the month/year, `-1MO` - last monday of the month/year).

bymonthday.title: By day of the month
bymonthday.description: A comma separated list of month days (1-31). Each month day can have a plus(+) or minus(-) prefix.

bysetpos.title: By set position
bysetpos.description: A comma separater list of the nth occurance within `bymonthday`.

billing.title: Account billing
billing.description: If account is set to automatically settle each month this object includes details about the billing day of the month.

byday.title: By day
byday.description: A comma separated list of weekdays (`MO,TU..`). Each weekday can have be preceded by a positive or negative number (`1MO` - 1st monday of the month/year, `-1MO` - last monday of the month/year).

bymonthday.title: By day of the month
bymonthday.description: A comma separated list of month days (1-31). Each month day can have a plus(+) or minus(-) prefix.

bysetpos.title: By set position
bysetpos.description: A comma separater list of the nth occurance within `bymonthday`.

count.title: Count
count.description: Number of times the account has been used.

recalculated.title: Recalculated
recalculated.description: Is `true` if account balance has been calculated (if `false` try pulling again until `true`).

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.title: List accounts
links.description: Get all users accounts.

per_page.description: Number of resource objects to return.

since.description: Return all accounts that were modified since timestamp.

status.description: Return only accounts with a specific status.

ids.description: A comma separated list of account ids to return.

links.description: Get a specific account.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency
main_rate.description: Entry exchange rate main currency calculated according to entry [main](/docs/me) currency.

fixed.title: Fixed exchange rate
fixed.description: If set to true, the exchange rate is fixed.

goal.description: If account is a savings goal this includes a savings goal object.

start.title: Goal start date
start.description: Savings goal start date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

end.title: Goal end date
end.description: Savings goal end date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

name_override.title: Name override
name_override.description: Is true if name is overriden with a custom name.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency

links.title: Delete account
description: Delete an account. Some related data is updated asynchronously.
If the account is the only account it cannot be deleted.
The entries are moved to default account
If account is the default one another account with the highest balance is selected to be default.

links.title: Force delete account
description: Delete an account. Some related data is updated asynchronously.
If the account is the only account it cannot be deleted.
An additional POST form parameter `password` is required. Entries are deleted

links.title: Move account
links.description: Move an account to a new position in the list.

links.title: Reorder accounts
links.description: Reorder account list.

order.description: An array of account ids based on new order.

links.title: Merge accounts
links.description: Merge multiple accounts into one. All entries and budgets with the selected accounts will be updated. After merging the selected accounts will be deleted.

account.title: Account
account.description: Account id to merge selected categories into. If `null` a new account with `title` is created.

title.title: New account title
title.description: If `account` is `null` then `title` is used to name the newly created account.

currency.title: New account currency
currency.description: Currency of the newly created account. Ignored if `account` is an existing account.

sync.title: Sync accounts
sync.description: List of bank accounts that will remain in sync with the bank. If `null` the none will remain in sync.

entry.title: Entries
description: Entries endpoint can be used to interact with [users](/docs/me) expenses and incomes.

Expenses have a negative prefix, incomes don't have a prefix. Every entry is part of an [account](/docs/accounts), is in one [category](/docs/categories), _can_ have [tags](/docs/tags), _can_ be part of a repeat, _can_ be part of a transaction and _can_ include [images](/docs/entries/images).

An entry is repeating if it includes the `repeat` object. Repeat parameters `start`, `end`, `frequency`, `interval`, `count` and `byday` are used according to [RFC 5545 RRULE](http://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5545#section-3.3.10).
A transaction is a transfer of funds from one account to the other. An entry is part of transaction if it includes the `transation` object.
If you try edit an entry that is part of a transaction, the server will automatically update the companion entry.

_Note:_ Be advised that only [pro accounts](/docs/free) can upload entry images. If a user with a free account tries to add an image, a 403 (Forbidden) [error](/docs/errors) will be returned and the image will be discarded.

rate.title: Exchange rate
rate.description: Entry exchange rate calculated according to entry [account](/docs/accounts) currency.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency
main_rate.description: Entry exchange rate main currency calculated according to entry [main](/docs/me) currency.

fixed.title: Fixed exchange rate
fixed.description: If set to true, the exchange rate is fixed.

id.title: Location id
id.description: Location id. This is the internal Toshl id, not the Foursquare venue id. Not set if user did not select a location.

venue_id.title: Venue id
venue_id.description: Foursquare venue id. Not set if user did not select a location.

created.title: Date created
created.description: Specifies when the entry was created.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the entry was last modified.

rate.title: Exchange rate
rate.description: Entry exchange rate calculated according to entry [account](/docs/accounts) currency.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency
main_rate.description: Entry exchange rate main currency calculated according to entry [main](/docs/me) currency.

fixed.title: Fixed exchange rate
fixed.description: If set to true, the exchange rate is fixed.

images.title: Images
images.description: List of entry images. Each entry can have up to 4 images.

path.title: Image path
path.description: Path to image. Append `thumb.jpg` (width 640px) or `full.jpg` to path to get different variants of the image.

filename.title: Attachment file name.
filename.description: Name of the attachment file. Use it together with path to retrieve the attachment.

type.title: Attachment type.
type.description: Attachment type can be either `image` or `pdf`.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.description: List of entry reminders. Each entry can have up to 5 reminder. List is returned sorted by `period` and `number`.

number.description: The number of periods before entry date -> 2 weeks before date: `period = week`, `number = 2`

at.description: Time of day for the reminder to fire in `HH:mm:ss` format.

import.title: Entry import
import.description: If entry was imported via a bank import (file or bank sync) this object is returned.

connection.title: Connection id
connection.description: Bank connection id which is responsible for the entry import.

review.title: Entry review
review.description: If entry is linked to a review (subject, match or resulting entry), this object is returned

completed.title: Completed
completed.description: If review has already been completed.

settle.title: Settle entry
settle.description: If this entry is part of the settle made automatically, then settle object is returned.

split.title: Entry split
split.description: If entry was created by splitting up another, this object is returned.

parent.title: Parent id
parent.description: Link to parent that was used to create this split entry.

children.title: Children
children.description: Array of entry ids that have the same parent.

completed.title: Paid
completed.description: If an entry has a reminder, this field indicates if the bill has been paid or not. Once it has reminders for this entry no longer fire.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.description: Get an entry.

links.title: Create entry
links.description: Create a new entry. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

rate.title: Exchange rate
rate.description: Entry exchange rate calculated according to entry [account](/docs/accounts) currency.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency

id.title: Location id
id.description: Location id. This is the internal Toshl id, not the Foursquare venue id. Not set if user did not select a location.

venue_id.title: Venue id
venue_id.description: Foursquare venue id. Not set if user did not select a location.

end.title: End date.
end.description: Repeat end date. If end date is not specified the `end` parameter is omitted. `count` can be specified instead of `end`.

interval.title: Frequency
interval.description: Repeat interval. For example: repeating every two months -> frequency: `monthly`, interval: `2`.

count.title: Count
count.description: How many times to repeat entry.

byday.title: By day
byday.description: A comma separated list of weekdays (`MO,TU..`). Each weekday can have be preceded by a positive or negative number (`1MO` - 1st monday of the month/year, `-1MO` - last monday of the month/year).

bymonthday.title: By day of the month
bymonthday.description: A comma separated list of month days (1-31). Each month day can have a plus(+) or minus(-) prefix.

bysetpos.title: By set position
bysetpos.description: A comma separater list of the nth occurance within `bymonthday`. If you wish to set a repeat to occur on the last day of the month, set `frequency` to `monthly`, `bymonthday` to `28,29,30,31` and `bysetpos` to `-1`.

iteration.title: Iteration number
iteration.description: Repeat iteration number. First entry in the repeat has `iteration=0`.

rate.title: Exchange rate
rate.description: Entry exchange rate calculated according to entry [account](/docs/accounts) currency.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency
main_rate.description: Entry exchange rate main currency calculated according to entry [main](/docs/me) currency.

fixed.title: Fixed exchange rate
fixed.description: If set to true, the exchange rate is fixed.

images.title: Images
images.description: List of entry images. Each entry can have up to 4 images.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.description: List of entry reminders. Each entry can have up to 5 reminder.

number.description: The number of periods before entry date -> 2 weeks before date: `period = week`, `number = 2`

at.description: Time of day for the reminder to fire in `HH:mm:ss` format.

split.description: If entry was created by splitting up another, this object is returned.

parent.title: Parent id
parent.description: Link to parent that was used to create this split entry.

completed.title: Paid
completed.description: If an entry has a reminder, this field indicates if the bill has been paid or not. Once it has reminders for this entry no longer fire.

links.title: Update entry
description: Update an entry. Some related data is updated asynchronously. If entry is part of a repeat clients can set an additional GET parameter `update` which dictates which entries in the repeat to update. Possible values are:

|*all*|Updates all entries in the repeat.|
|*one*|Updates only the sent entry.|
|*tail*|Updates the sent entry and all following.|
If `update` parameter is not specified the default value is *all*.
_Note_: When using the `update` parameter, all changes made on the entries will be lost.

If entry is part of a repeat clients can set an additional GET parameters `delete_after_date` or `delete_after_count` which dictates that entries in the repeat after specified date or specified count will be deleted.

links.title: Delete entry
description: Delete an entry. Some related data is updated asynchronously. If entry is part of a repeat clients can set an additional GET parameter `delete` which dictates which entries in the repeat to delete. Possible values are:

|*all*|Deletes all entries in the repeat.|
|*one*|Deletes only the sent entry.|
|*tail*|Deletes the sent entry and all following.|
If `delete` parameter is not specified the default value is *all*.

links.description: Get linked account.
Get linked category.
Get a list of included tags.
Get the transaction companion.
Get entry location.

links.title: Manage entries
links.description: To manage entries in bulk first select which entries you want to manage by selecting `tags`, `accounts` or `categories` and then set the desired `tags`, `account` or `category`. You must set at least one `with` and one `set` property for this endpoint to work. See example for more info.

links.title: Undo split
links.description: Undo entry split. This recreates the original entry and deletes any children that were linked to parent.

budget.title: Budgets
description: Budgets endpoint can be used to interact with [users](/docs/me) budgets. Endpoint returns only active budgets (can also return deleted budgets if `include_deleted` is true). If a client does not know how to calculate a budgets history it can set `expand` to `true` and the API will do the work. For this to work well, please include `from` and `to` whenever possible.

_Note:_ Only one active monthly budget for all expenses can exist at any one time. If a user tries to add a second general monthly budget, a 403 (Forbidden) [error](/docs/errors) will be returned and the budget will be discarded.

_Note:_ Be advised that budgets are subject to [free account limitation](/docs/free). If a user with a free account tries to add a third budget, a 403 (Forbidden) [error](/docs/errors) will be returned and the budget will be discarded.

limit_planned.title: Limit
limit_planned.description: Planned budget limit is the limit based only on planned incomes.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Budget amount, always calculated into budget `currency`.

planned.title: Planned amount
planned.description: Planned amount is the amount of expenses that will fall into the budget after today.

code.title: Currency
code.description: Budget currency code. Currency code is updatable only if all iterations are updated, or if budget is non repeating

rate.title: Exchange rate
rate.description: Budget exchange rate calculated according to users currency. If not set (and currency differs from main currency) the daily exchange rate will be used.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency
main_rate.description: Entry exchange rate main currency calculated according to entry [main](/docs/me) currency.

fixed.title: Fixed exchange rate
fixed.description: If set to true, the exchange rate is not refreshed on next budget iteration.

rollover.title: Rollover
rollover.description: Boolean which determines if rollover is enabled for budget. If rollover is enabled whatever is left of the budget `limit` is carried over to the next month.

rollover_override.title: Rollover override
rollover_override.description: Is true if rollover is overriden with a custom amount (can be useful for smart clients).

rollover_amount.title: Rollover amount
rollover_amount.description: Budget rollover amount. If client updates this the rollovers from previous months are not transferred anymore.

rollover_amount_planned.title: Planned rollover amount
rollover_amount_planned.description: Planned budget rollover amount. It takes into account aonly planned expenses.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the budget was last modified.

byday.title: By day
byday.description: A weekday (`MO,TU..`). Each weekday can have be preceded by a positive or negative number (`1MO` - 1st monday of the month/year, `-1MO` - last monday of the month/year). Only one weekday can be set - a limitation due to the nature of budgets.

bymonthday.title: By day of the month
bymonthday.description: A comma separated list of unique month days (1-31). Each month day can have a plus(+) prefix. Only one month day can be specified due to the nature of budgets. In the case of `bysetpos` being `-1`, the value can be `28,29,30,31` or `28,29,30`  or `28,29`

bysetpos.title: By set position
bysetpos.description: A comma separater list of the nth occurance within `bymonthday`. If you wish to set the budget to repeat on the last day of the month, set `frequency` to `monthly`, `bymonthday` to `28,29,30,31` and `bysetpos` to `-1`.

iteration.title: Budget iteration
iteration.description: Budget iteration number. First budget in iteration has `iteration=0`.

status.title: Status
status.description: Budget status. Budget can have an inactive state if users pro account has expired.

delta.title: Delta
delta.description: Used to define monthly budget -/+ delta.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: An `array` of tag ids included in budget.

!tags.title: Excluded tags
!tags.description: An `array` of tag ids excluded from the budget.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: An `array` of category ids included in budget.

!categories.title: Excluded categories
!categories.description: An `array` of category ids excluded from the budget.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: An `array` of account ids included in budget.

!accounts.title: Excluded accounts
!accounts.description: An `array` of account ids excluded from the budget.

recalculated.title: Recalculated
recalculated.description: Is `true` if budget balance and rollovers have been calculated (if `false` try pulling again until `true`).

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

deleted_accounts.title: Deleted accounts
deleted_accounts.description: An `array` of ids of deleted accounts of the budget.

deleted_tags.title: Deleted tags
deleted_tags.description: An `array` of ids of deleted tags of the budget.

deleted_categories.title: Deleted categories
deleted_categories.description: An `array` of ids of deleted categories of the budget.

links.title: Get budget
links.description: Get budget details.

links.title: Create budget
links.description: Create a new budget. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Budget limit. If `type != regular` this field is read only.

rate.title: Exchange rate
rate.description: Budget exchange rate calculated according to users currency. If not set (and currency differs from main currency) the daily exchange rate will be used.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency
main_rate.description: Entry exchange rate main currency calculated according to entry [main](/docs/me) currency.

fixed.title: Fixed exchange rate
fixed.description: If set to true, the exchange rate is not refreshed on next budget iteration.

rollover.title: Rollover
rollover.description: Boolean which determines if rollover is enabled for budget. If rollover is enabled whatever is left of the budget `limit` is carried over to the next month.

rollover_override.title: Rollover override
rollover_override.description: Is true if rollover is overriden with a custom amount (can be useful for smart clients).

rollover_amount.title: Rollover amount
rollover_amount.description: Budget rollover amount. If client updates this the rollovers from previous months are not transferred anymore.

byday.title: By day
byday.description: A weekday (`MO,TU..`). Each weekday can have be preceded by a positive or negative number (`1MO` - 1st monday of the month/year, `-1MO` - last monday of the month/year). Only one weekday can be set - a limitation due to the nature of budgets.

bymonthday.title: By day of the month
bymonthday.description: A comma separated list of month days (1-31). Each month day can have a plus(+) or minus(-) prefix. Only one month day can be specified due to the nature of budgets.

bysetpos.title: By set position
bysetpos.description: A comma separater list of the nth occurance within `bymonthday`. If you wish to set the budget to repeat on the last day of the month, set `frequency` to `monthly`, `bymonthday` to `28,29,30,31` and `bysetpos` to `-1`.

percent.title: Percent
percent.description: Percent of monthly income. If `type` is `percent` this field *must* be set or server will report an error.

delta.title: Delta
delta.description: Used to define monthly budget -/+ delta. If `type` if `delta` this field *must* be set or server will report an error.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: An `array` of tag ids included in budget.

!tags.title: Excluded tags
!tags.description: An `array` of tag ids excluded from the budget.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: An `array` of category ids included in budget.

!categories.title: Excluded categories
!categories.description: An `array` of category ids excluded from the budget.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: An `array` of account ids included in budget.

!accounts.title: Excluded accounts
!accounts.description: An `array` of account ids excluded from the budget.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.title: Update budget
description: Update a budget. Some related data is updated asynchronously. Clients can set an additional query parameter `update` which dictates which budgets to update. Possible values are:

|*all*|Updates are to effect all past and future budgets.|
|*one*|Updates only the current budget.|
|*tail*|Updates will be in effect from now on.|
If `update` parameter is not specified the default value is **all**.
_Note_: Certain circumstances will cause all changes made to past or future budgets to be lost.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Budget limit. If `type != regular` this field is read only.

rate.title: Exchange rate
rate.description: Budget exchange rate calculated according to users currency. If not set (and currency differs from main currency) the daily exchange rate will be used.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency
main_rate.description: Entry exchange rate main currency calculated according to entry [main](/docs/me) currency.

fixed.title: Fixed exchange rate
fixed.description: If set to true, the exchange rate is not refreshed on next budget iteration.

rollover.title: Rollover
rollover.description: Boolean which determines if rollover is enabled for budget. If rollover is enabled whatever is left of the budget `limit` is carried over to the next month.

rollover_amount.title: Rollover amount
rollover_amount.description: Current budget rollover amount if rollover is `true`.

rollover_override.title: Rollover override
rollover_override.description: Is true if rollover is overriden with a custom amount (can be useful for smart clients).

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the budget was last modified.

percent.title: Percent
percent.description: Percent of monthly income. If `type` is `percent` this field *must* be set or server will report an error.

delta.title: Delta
delta.description: Used to define monthly budget -/+ delta. If `type` if `delta` this field *must* be set or server will report an error.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: An `array` of tag ids included in budget.

!tags.title: Excluded tags
!tags.description: An `array` of tag ids excluded from the budget.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: An `array` of category ids included in budget.

!categories.title: Excluded categories
!categories.description: An `array` of category ids excluded from the budget.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: An `array` of account ids included in budget.

!accounts.title: Excluded accounts
!accounts.description: An `array` of account ids excluded from the budget.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.title: Delete budget
links.description: Delete a budget. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

links.title: Reorder budgets
links.description: Move a budget to a new position in the list.

links.title: Reorder budgets
links.description: Reorder budget list.

order.description: An array of budget ids based on new order.

links.description: Get budget history.

per_page.description: Number of resource objects to return.

from.description: Used to define date range, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to.description: Used to define date range, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

links.description: Get expenses included in the budget.

category.title: Categories
category.description: Categories endpoint can be used to interact with [users](/docs/me) categories.

name_override.title: Name override
name_override.description: Is true if name is overriden with a custom name.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the category was last modified.

income_entries.title: Entry count
income_entries.description: Number of income entries with category. Given only for unsorted category.

expense_entries.title: Entry count
expense_entries.description: Number of expense entries with category. Given only for unsorted category.

tags_used_with_category.title: Tag count
tags_used_with_category.description: Number of tags used with category.

income_tags_used_with_category.title: Tag count
income_tags_used_with_category.description: Number of income tags used with category. Given only for unsorted category.

expense_tags_used_with_category.title: Tag count
expense_tags_used_with_category.description: Number of expense tags used with category. Given only for unsorted category.

tags.title: Tag count
tags.description: Number of tags used with category.

income_tags.title: Tag count
income_tags.description: Number of income tags used with category. Given only for unsorted category.

expense_tags.title: Tag count
expense_tags.description: Number of expense tags used with category. Given only for unsorted category.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.title: Get category
links.description: Get a category.

links.title: Create category
links.description: Create a new category. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.title: Delete category
links.description: Delete a category. Some related data is updated asynchronously.
Get a list of entries with category.
Get a list of budgets with category.

links.title: Merge categories
links.description: Merge multiple categories into one. All entries and budgets with the selected categories will be updated. After merging the selected categories will be deleted. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

category.title: Category
category.description: Category id to merge selected categories into.

tag.title: Tags
tag.description: Tags endpoint can be used to interact with [users](/docs/me) tags.

name_override.title: Name override
name_override.description: Is true if name is overriden with a custom name.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the tag was last modified.

category.title: Primary category
category.description: Primary category id of the tag.

counts.description: Number of times the tag has been used on entries and budgets.

unsorted_entries.title: Unsorted Entry Count
unsorted_entries.description: Number of entries with tag and unsorted category.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.title: Get tag
links.description: Get a tag.

links.title: Create tag
links.description: Create a new tag. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

category.title: Primary category
category.description: Primary category id of the tag.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.title: Update tag
links.description: Update a tag. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

name_override.description: Is true if name is overriden with a custom name.

modified.title: Last modified

category.title: Primary category
category.description: Primary category id of the tag.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.description: Delete a tag. Some related data is updated asynchronously.
Get a list of entries with tag.

links.title: Merge tags
links.description: Merge multiple tags into one. All entries and budgets with selected tags will be updated. When merging `tags` must be set, but only one of the remainig parameters may be set. After merging the selected tags will be deleted. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

tag.title: Tag
tag.description: Tag id to merge selected tags into.

category.title: Category
category.description: Category id to merge selected tags into.

account.title: Account
account.description: Account id to merge selected tags into.

currency.title: Currencies
currency.description: Currencies endpoint can be used to fetch details about currencies the Toshl API supports. The response includes an `ETag` which you _should_ use to see if any of the currencies have changed since your last check. For daily exchange rates please use a service like the awesome [Open Exchange Rates](https://openexchangerates.org) which we already use in our apps.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Number of decimal places for currency.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the currency was last modified.

links.title: List currencies
links.description: Get all available currencies.

currencies.description: A comma separated list of currencies to return.

since.description: Return all currencies that were modified since timestamp.

types.description: Return all currencies of a specific type.

export.title: Exports
export.description: Export users data in the selected formats. Exports are generated asynchronously so clients need to either implement pooling and wait for an export status to change to `generated` or wait for notification that is sent when export generation is complete.

from.description: Used to define date range, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to.description: Used to define date range, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

created.title: Date created
created.description: Specifies when the export was created.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the export was last modified.

seen.title: Seen
seen.description: Marked as `true` if user has already seen the export after it was generated. If not set to `true` the system will send out a push notification after export was generated (with a slight delay).

data.title: Export data
data.description: Export data after file was uploaded to S3

valid_until.title: Valid until
valid_until.description: Specifies how long the export file links will be valid.

links.title: Get export
links.description: Get export details.

links.title: Create export
links.description: Create a new export.

from.description: Used to define date range, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to.description: Used to define date range, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

seen.title: Seen
seen.description: Marked as `true` if user has already seen the export after it was generated. If not set to `true` the system will send out a push notification after export was generated (with a slight delay).

links.title: Update export
links.description: Update an export. Currently only `seen` can be updated, all other parameters are ignored. Make sure to send an up to date `modified`.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the export was last modified.

seen.title: Seen
seen.description: Marked as `true` if user has already seen the export after it was generated. If not set to `true` the system will send out a push notification after export was generated (with a slight delay).
